patches.hypothesis: The refined patch will address overfitting by using a more robust approach to handle null values, adding more test cases to cover different scenarios, and refactoring the patch to make it more general and robust. It will also avoid hardcoded values and lack of generalization in the original patch.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the lack of a null check in the method, which results in a NullPointerException when the method is called with a null argument.
